finalMessage.title: END OF CODE
finalMessage.content: If you read it, act. If you act, measure. If you measure, lead.
finalMessage.closing: Costa Digital: the future is built from here.

preamble.title: PREAMBLE
content: We are the Caribbean Order that chooses technology to transform realities.
We don't wait for the future: we build it from here.

principles.title: I. FOUNDATIONAL PRINCIPLES
items: Identity before imitation.
Community before ego.
Education before opinion.
Action before excuse.
Measurable impact before noise.
Ethics before shortcuts.
Caribbean before borders.

mission.title: II. CENTRAL MISSION
content: Turn the Caribbean into Colombia's new tech epicenter:
items: training world-class talent,
creating high-impact startups,
attracting investment and decent jobs,
exporting innovation with Caribbean seal.

practice.title: III. PRACTICE PRECEPTS
items: Sharing knowledge is law: document, open, teach.
Collaboration is the way: those who add up win.
Rigor distinguishes us: we measure, iterate, improve.
Diversity is advantage: more perspectives = better solutions.
Culture is the engine: we create technology with Caribbean flavor.
Coherence is power: what we say, we do.

mastery.title: IV. CRAFT MASTERY
items: Learn continuously.
Build real products.
Show work without fear.
Seek hard and honest feedback.
Raise the standard with every delivery.

leadership.title: V. LEADERSHIP (FROM LEADER TO VOLUNTEER)
items: Serve first, command later.
Give credit in public; correct in private.
Delegate with clarity; demand with respect.
Care for the common brand over personal shine.
Train someone who can replace you.

rules.title: VI. HOUSE RULES
items: Every event has purpose, metrics, and published learning.
No sponsorship is negotiated without common mandate.
The calendar is sacred: coordination before broadcast.
The Costa Digital brand is used with honor or not used.

prohibited.title: VII. PROHIBITED CONDUCT
items: ✗ Protagonism that detracts from the community.
✗ Promises without delivery.
✗ Appropriating others' work.
✗ Breaking one's word.
✗ Shortcuts that compromise ethics or security.

pact.title: VIII. PACT WITH THE CITIES
content: Barranquilla, Cartagena, Santa Marta and the entire Caribbean:
we bring knowledge, opportunities and networks;
we return with trained talent and living projects.

oath.title: IX. MEMBER'S OATH
content: "From the Caribbean and for the world,
I swear to learn, build and share.
I swear to honor ethics, community and excellence.
I swear to turn our Caribbean into a technology epicenter."

hero.title: The tech ecosystem of the Colombian Caribbean
hero.subtitle: Connect talent, startups, companies and institutions to learn, build and scale in technology. One membership. Many opportunities. A living ecosystem.

whatIs.title: What is Costa Digital?
whatIs.description: Costa Digital is the technology cluster of the Colombian Caribbean. An ecosystem that brings together communities, startups, education, innovation and investment.
whatIs.footnote: Operated by Ciudad Inmersiva SAS, in partnership with Fundación Código Abierto and ecosystem organizations.

enterprise.title: Enterprise / Innovation
enterprise.description: Not a membership. Open innovation programs, corporate challenges, labs with Ciudad Inmersiva and FCA, demo days and pilots.

impact.title: Your membership also builds impact
impact.description: Part of the revenue supports scholarships, accessible training and open events executed by Fundación Código Abierto.

q1.question: Is Costa Digital a company?
q1.answer: Costa Digital is the technology cluster of the Colombian Caribbean, a brand that represents the ecosystem. Membership is operated by Ciudad Inmersiva SAS, in partnership with Fundación Código Abierto and ecosystem organizations. Part of the revenue goes to impact programs executed by FCA.

q2.question: Does membership guarantee discounts/benefits?
q2.answer: Benefits and discounts are offered by ecosystem allies and are subject to availability. Costa Digital facilitates access to these benefits, but does not guarantee specific results. We connect the right people at the right time.

q3.question: Can I cancel at any time?
q3.answer: Yes, you can cancel your membership at any time. Cancellation is monthly and does not require a long-term commitment.

q4.question: What's the difference between Community and Builder?
q4.answer: Builder includes everything from Community, plus preferential access to paid events, closed dynamics, basic visibility as an active member, early access to programs (Tech Centre, Ciudad Inmersiva), preferential pricing on Parla Startupera, and eligibility for premium programs like Synergy.

q5.question: How does it work for companies?
q5.answer: The Company plan is designed for companies and organizations seeking visibility, access to talent, private B2B events and activations with communities. It includes featured profile, access to dealflow and Caribe Ventures when applicable. For more complex open innovation programs, there is the Enterprise/Innovation option that includes corporate challenges, labs and demo days.

finalCta.title: It's not a club. It's an ecosystem.

terms.acceptanceText: By accessing and using the Costa Digital platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you should not use the platform.
terms.ecosystemTitle: Participation in the Costa Digital Ecosystem
terms.ecosystemIntro: By registering on the Costa Digital platform, users, startups, companies or communities become part of the Costa Digital ecosystem, an open network that connects talent, organizations and technology projects in the Caribbean.
terms.ecosystemBullet1: Participate in ecosystem initiatives, programs and events.
terms.ecosystemBullet2: Appear in public directories or ecosystem maps (when applicable).
terms.ecosystemBullet3: Receive information about opportunities, collaborations and Costa Digital activities.
terms.ecosystemVoluntary: Participation in the ecosystem is voluntary and does not imply a contractual, employment or corporate relationship between Costa Digital and its members.
terms.ecosystemReserve: Costa Digital reserves the right to accept, reject or remove profiles that are not aligned with the principles and objectives of the ecosystem.
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your access credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide truthful and up-to-date information at the time of registration. Costa Digital reserves the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms.
terms.contentText: By publishing content on the platform (profiles, job offers, comments, articles, etc.), you grant Costa Digital a non-exclusive license to display and distribute such content within the platform. You are solely responsible for the content you publish and warrant that it does not infringe the rights of third parties.
terms.intellectualText: The Costa Digital platform, its design, code, logos and original content are the property of Costa Digital or their respective owners. Reproduction, distribution or modification without prior authorization is prohibited.
terms.conductBullet1: Publish false, defamatory, offensive or illegal content.
terms.conductBullet2: Use the platform to send spam or unsolicited communications.
terms.conductBullet3: Attempt to access other users' accounts or data without authorization.
terms.conductBullet4: Carry out activities that damage the operation of the platform.
terms.limitationText: Costa Digital provides the platform "as is" and does not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. Costa Digital is not responsible for direct, indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of the platform. Connections and relationships between users are the sole responsibility of the parties involved.
terms.modificationsText: Costa Digital reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will be notified through the platform. Continued use of the platform after publication of changes constitutes acceptance thereof.
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, contact us at contacto@costadigital.org

privacy.collectionIntro: We collect the following information when you use our platform:
privacy.collectionBullet1: Registration information: name, email, account type and organization data.
privacy.collectionBullet2: Profile information: biography, skills, work experience, education, photo and social media links.
privacy.collectionBullet3: Generated content: posts, comments, job offers and applications.
privacy.collectionBullet4: Usage data: information about how you interact with the platform, pages visited and features used.
privacy.useBullet2: Manage your account and profile within the ecosystem.
privacy.useBullet4: Send relevant communications about the ecosystem, events and opportunities.
privacy.useBullet5: Generate aggregated and anonymous statistics about the ecosystem.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share information in the following cases: when you choose to make your profile public within the platform, with service providers that help us operate the platform (such as hosting and analytics services), when required by law or to protect our legal rights.
privacy.publicText: By making your profile public on the platform, you agree that your profile information (name, title, skills, experience) will be visible to other users and may appear in ecosystem directories. You can change your profile visibility at any time from your dashboard.
privacy.securityText: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of Internet transmission is completely secure, so we cannot guarantee the absolute security of data.
privacy.rightsBullet1: Access your personal information stored on the platform.
privacy.rightsBullet3: Request the deletion of your account and associated data.
privacy.rightsBullet4: Object to the processing of your data for specific purposes.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar technologies to keep your session active, remember your preferences and analyze platform usage. You can manage cookies from your browser settings.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Notice periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or by email.
privacy.contactText: To exercise your rights or make privacy inquiries, write to us at contacto@costadigital.org
